title: cucumis engleri
intro: Cucumis engleri, also known as wild gherkin, is a type of vining plant belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cucumis engleri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
